overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character with a flashlight exploring a foggy, rain-soaked abandoned city street at night. The character walks past parked cars and under a stone archway toward a glowing red neon sign, creating an atmosphere of tension and isolation.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban street with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the foggy street with flashlight illuminating parked cars and wet pavement

entered.detail: dark colored sedan parked along the curb with visible rear lights
tall street lamp casting yellow light through the fog
dark building front with windows barely visible through mist

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a deserted, rain-slicked city street lined with parked sedans. The flashlight beam cuts through the thick fog, illuminating the wet asphalt and abandoned vehicles while distant street lamps cast a dim yellow glow through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway passage with iron fencing

events.description: approaching and entering a covered stone archway passage
ambient light dims significantly when entering the covered archway

agents.ego_description: walking under the stone archway while sweeping flashlight across the passage walls and iron fence

entered.detail: large stone archway forming a covered passage over the street
black wrought iron fence running along the right side of the path
leafless tree trunk visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a stone archway that provides partial shelter from the rain. An iron fence lines the right side as the flashlight illuminates the textured stone walls of the passage, transitioning from the open street to a more enclosed, darker space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with prominent neon signage

events.description: exiting the archway into an open area with visible heavy rainfall
red neon stationery sign becomes clearly visible through the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the glowing red neon sign while rain falls heavily around the character

entered.detail: bright red neon sign reading 'STATIONERY' with logo above text

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway into a more open street, heavy rainfall becomes visibly apparent against the street lamps. A bright red neon sign reading 'STATIONERY' glows through the fog ahead, serving as a beacon as the character continues down the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with construction barriers and debris

events.description: approaching construction barriers and traffic cones blocking the path ahead

agents.ego_description: moving past the stationery store sign and approaching construction barriers while sweeping flashlight across the debris

entered.detail: orange and white striped traffic barrel blocking part of the street
orange traffic cone with reflective stripes
white and orange construction barricade with diagonal stripes

segments.scene_description: The character passes the stationery store and approaches a section of the street blocked by construction barriers and orange traffic barrels. The flashlight illuminates the debris and abandoned vehicles as the character navigates toward the obstruction, maintaining a cautious pace through the rain-soaked environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked city street that transitions from a wide, foggy thoroughfare into a confined passage before opening up toward a glowing urban landmark. It begins with the character walking past parked sedans, where a flashlight beam cuts through thick mist and dim yellow street lamps. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a more enclosed and darker space while passing through a textured stone archway lined by an iron fence. The environment then opens back up into the heavy rainfall, where the fog is pierced by the bright red glow of a stationery store neon sign. Finally, the camera follows the character past the store toward a blocked section of the street, navigating through construction barriers and orange traffic barrels amidst the wet debris.
